# Traceability Checklist

- List all impacted requirement IDs (`FR-*`, `NFR-*`, `AC-*`).
- Link implementation steps to `TASK-*` items when known.
- Reference milestone context (`MILE-*`) for scope-sensitive work.
- Map risks (`RISK-*`) if change touches unstable areas.
- Add a final "Implements" line in completion notes.
